lint-knowledgebase.observation: [knowledgebase-lint] OK — full-contract mode with no compatibility fallback

check-enterprise-policy.observation: [enterprise-policy] OK — canonical dispatch source path verified, R2 enterprise controls enforced

check-architecture.observation: [architecture-check] OK — allowlist evidence contract satisfied after fixing case-insensitive filename match

appliedUpdates.description: Fixed case-sensitivity bug in architecture allowlist evidence check: changed grep -Fxq to grep -Fixq so it matches docs/ARCHITECTURE.md regardless of whether git tracks it as uppercase or lowercase.
Updated .factory/library/docs-validation.md with two-mode contract design documentation (full-contract vs compatibility mode activation rules) and architecture allowlist evidence contract details.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Consider adding a note that docs-governance workers should expect feature boundary enforcement to be loose during multi-feature milestones — changes may accumulate across features and get committed by the last feature in the milestone.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review of docs-foundation-full-contract-lint-pass found the commit bundled 28 files changed from multiple features, as the worker found the lint already passing and committed staged/untracked changes from prior features.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Consider adding guidance that docs-worker features should avoid bundling new skill/droid infrastructure (e.g., dod-flow-documenter SKILL.md and droid config) into lint-alignment commits. These should be separate features or pre-conditions.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review found .factory/skills/dod-flow-documenter/SKILL.md and .factory/droids/dod-flow-documenter.md bundled into the lint-alignment commit without being mentioned in the feature description.
